properties.notes:
**Batch 1,2,3 - Scenario 9: Moving Between Main Residences (6-Month Overlap)**

Property owned from 1 Jul 2010 to 15 Aug 2024 (14.12 years). Overlapped with new residence for 136 days which is within the 6-month limit under s118-140 ITAA 1997.

**Timeline:**
- 1 Jul 2010 to 15 Aug 2024: Main residence (14.12 years)
- Overlap period: 136 days with new property (within 6-month limit)

**Expected Result:**
- Total capital gain (before exemption): $416,350
- Main Residence Exemption: 100% (six-month overlap rule applies)
- **NO CGT PAYABLE**

**ATO Rules Applied:**
- Section 118-140 ITAA 1997 (Six-Month Overlap Rule)
- When moving between main residences, both can be treated as main residence for up to 6 months if conditions met
